nl_query: How many evaluation attempts have been superseded by a new cycle?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(ea.id) AS superseded_attempts
FROM   evaluation_attempt ea
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id
WHERE  sa.reassigned_from IS NOT NULL
  AND  sa.evaluation_cycle > (SELECT MAX(ea2.evaluation_cycle) FROM evaluation_attempt ea2 WHERE ea2.is_active = TRUE)
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.evaluation_cycle. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
